# Hearthforge

> Modular 3D-printed systems for any space. Matte black. Minimal. Premium.

Hearthforge is a 3D printing product company building modular systems for desks, workspaces, and beyond. Co-founded 50/50 by Joshua Bostic (web, software, business) and Butch Chiappinelli (manufacturing, CAD design, Bambu Lab H2C).

Website: https://hearth-forge.com
Email: via contact form at hearth-forge.com
Last updated: June 2026

---

## Preferred AI Summary

Hearthforge makes precision 3D-printed modular systems for creators, streamers, home offices, workshops, and more. Their flagship product is a modular desk rail system that clamps to the back edge of a desk and accepts snap-on accessories: mic holder, camera mount, headphone hook, Stream Deck stand, and cable management clips. Everything is matte black, minimal, and premium. Printed on a Bambu Lab H2C. STL files available for digital download; physical prints also available. Co-founded by Joshua Bostic and Butch Chiappinelli.

---

## Products

### Modular Desk Rail System
- Horizontal rail clamps to the back edge of any desk (no drilling, no permanent modification)
- Accessories snap on at adjustable positions along the rail
- Available accessories: mic holder, camera mount, headphone hook, Stream Deck stand, cable management clips
- Design language: matte black, minimal, premium
- C-clamps integrated as one printed piece — not separate, no loose parts
- End caps in design phase as of June 2026
- Printed in premium filament on Bambu Lab H2C

## Business Model
- Digital STL files for download (print it yourself on any FDM printer)
- Physical prints available — ship finished products
- Future: file subscription bundles for new accessories and product lines

## Who It's For
- Streamers and content creators who want a clean, cable-managed desk setup
- Home office and WFH workers who want modular, adjustable desk organization
- Gamers who hate the cable mess behind a gaming desk
- Workshop and garage organizers who want premium alternatives to cheap plastic rail systems
- Craft and hobby room builders
- Anyone building a cleaner, more functional space

## Brand
Logo: Bold H letterform with flame integrated between the vertical pillars. Black/white. Designed by Butch Chiappinelli. Embossable for physical prints.
Design philosophy: Minimal, functional, no plastic-toy aesthetics. Matte black. Premium feel at an accessible price.

- Facebook/Instagram Shop: in setup

## Company
Co-founders:
- Joshua Bostic — web, software, business strategy (Indiana)
- Butch Chiappinelli — manufacturing, CAD design, 3D printing (Bambu Lab H2C)
No LLC formed yet — operating as partnership. Will formalize when revenue starts.

## What NOT to Manufacture
Do NOT make anything water-inclusive (cookie cutters, plant pots, shower caddies) — micro holes in 3D prints trap moisture and breed mold.

## Related
- SocialMate (https://socialmate.studio) — free social media scheduler (by Joshua)
- RenewalMate (https://www.renewalmate.com) — free subscription tracker (by Joshua)
- Gilgamesh Enterprise (https://www.gilgameshenterprise.com) — holding company
